creator: ports@skyforge.at
text:
Created attachment 223259
net-im/py-matrix-synapse: Update to 1.29.0

This patch updates our synapse port to the latest available version, 1.29.0. From a ports perspective, this is nothing particularly exciting safe for a simple version bump and shouldn't cause any problems. The only heads-up is that synapse now requires forwarded-for headers when running behind a reverse proxy, but it will warn the user if those are missing.


portlint: "OK" (3 Warnings, none new)
testport: OK (poudriere: 122amd64)
do-test: OK (Ran 1544 tests in 759.586s, PASSED (skips=16, successes=1528))


I've tested the resulting package in production for the last 2 days and haven't noticed any problems, but feedback is of course always welcome. :)

Cheers,
Sascha
